title: RH10 9BD, Digital Realty (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/EP3022ST/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Digital Realty (UK) Limited Installation name: Crawley Data Centre Campus Permit number: EPR/EP3022ST/A001  "
